2022-04-22

Business Model Canvas Part 2 - LibreOffice

Shown here is an HTML Business Model Canvas created from a Jupyter notebook. This approach is particularly suited in case a version control system or some sort of automation is required.

A simpler alternative consists of a BMC created with LibreOffice Calc. It can be downloaded here and then exported as a PDF file.

Finally, you can open the resulting PDF file with LibreOffice Draw and add sticky notes to different sections as shown in the figure below.

It's also possible to edit the BMC with Excalidraw. First, the BMC has be exported from Libreoffice as PNG file and then it can be used as a background image (insert image).
